title: Access Bank Completes Acquisition of BancABC Tanzania - FinancialEDGE
description: Access Bank Plc has successfully satisfied all legal and regulatory requirements to complete its acquisition of African Banking Corporation Limited. With the acquisition now finalised, the entity in Tanzania will operate under the name Access Bank Tanzania Limited, further consolidating Access Bank’s presence in the East African region. This milestone also builds on Access Bank’s
html:
Access Bank Plc has successfully satisfied all legal and regulatory requirements to complete its acquisition of African Banking Corporation Limited.
